step.title: Load architecture and identify critical paths
step.action: Read architecture document and extract performance-critical paths.
Identify APIs, database queries, and user flows with latency sensitivity.

step.title: Define performance goals
step.action: Define performance goals: response time, throughput, error rate targets.
If NFR requirements exist, align goals with specified thresholds.

step.title: Design load test scenarios
step.action: Design load test scenarios: normal, peak, stress, spike, and soak.
Define user concurrency levels and ramp-up patterns for each scenario.

step.title: Select tools
step.action: Select performance testing tools (k6, Artillery, Locust) with rationale.
Consider team familiarity, scripting language, and CI integration support.

step.title: Define baseline metrics and thresholds
step.action: Define baseline metrics for each critical path.
Set alerting thresholds for degradation detection.

step.title: Produce performance test plan
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with performance test details.
